use_codes.desc: ALKYLATING DRUG INDICATED FOR THE TOPICAL TREATMENT OF STAGE IA AND IB MYCOSIS FUNGOIDES-TYPE CUTANEOUS T-CELL LYMPHOMA IN PATIENTS WHO HAVE RECEIVED PRIOR SKIN DIRECTED THERAPY

indications.text:
VALCHLOR is indicated for the topical treatment of Stage IA and IB mycosis fungoides‐type cutaneous T‐cell lymphoma in
patients who have received prior skin‐directed therapy.

VALCHLOR is indicated for the topical treatment of Stage IA and IB mycosis fungoides-type cutaneous T-cell lymphoma in
patients who have received prior skin-directed therapy.

VALCHLOR is an alkylating drug indicated for the topical treatment of Stage IA and IB mycosis fungoides‐type cutaneous
T‐cell lymphoma in patients who have received prior skin‐directed therapy.
